title: Selenius (disambiguation)
content:
'''Selenius''' may refer to one of the following:

*The '''[[Selenius system/Legends|Selenius system]]''', a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] in the [[D'Aelgoth sector/Legends|D'Aelgoth sector]]
*'''[[Selenius VII]]''', also known as '''Selenius''', an astronomical object in the Selenius system

{{Disambig}}
